top_signals.title: CMA CGM Q1 Resilient, but Shipping Margins Tighten Amid Geopolitical Turbulence
top_signals.summary: CMA CGM delivered a resilient first quarter, but the numbers underscore the increasingly complex environment facing the global container shipping and logistics giant.The Marseille-based group reported first-quarter revenue of $13.23 billion…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Libya and Syria join Turkey’s flagship military exercise in historic firsts
top_signals.summary: Ankara framed both nations’ attendance as part of its broader military-restructuring and advisory programs in each country.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Former US execs plead guilty to aiding tech support scammers
top_signals.summary: Two former executives of a call-tracking and analytics company pleaded guilty to concealing a years-long tech support fraud scheme that victimized individuals worldwide. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
